text:
Once upon a time, there was an old wise oak tree. Everyone who lived near it loved listening to stories about its adventures. One day the oak tree decided to embark on an exciting journey.

It began high in the mountains. As it traveled, it met a wise old owl. The owl told tales of faraway lands. The oak tree listened carefully and learned new things.

After a time, the journey brought the tree to a peaceful lake shore. There it saw a beautiful frog sitting quietly. The frog listened intently. The tree thought for a long time and decided to tell its frog friend.

"I have a secret," the tree said. "When I tap once, something wonderful happens!" It tapped its leafy hand.

The frog croaked softly.

"The moon!" said the tree. "The moon shines bright all night." It tapped the moon. Moonlight danced on water lilies.

Suddenly a breeze lifted a butterfly. "How about me?" the butterfly asked.
